title: lobelia irasuensis subsp. irasuensis
intro: Lobelia irasuensis subsp. irasuensis, also known as Lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family that is native to New Caledonia. The medicinal properties of Lobelia include its ability to stimulate the nervous system and increase circulation, which can be beneficial in treating respiratory issues and relieving pain. The health benefits of Lobelia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a useful treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lobelia can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity.
